title: Ackers Shot Glass Measuring Cup 4 Ounce/120ML Liquid Heavy High Espresso Glass Cup Red Line，V-Shaped Spout
description:
About this item
[Version 2.0] For most customers, the response scale line is easy to fade. We have optimized the 1.0 version of the measuring cup to make the 2.0 version of the measuring cup scale line more acid and alkali resistant. Please feel free to use
[HEAVYWEIGHT GLASS] allows clear view of contents for more control and accuracy; weighted base helps reduce tipping for less mess.Easily measure and transport smaller amounts without them spilling; steadier than using measuring spoons; perfect for kitchen, home, lawn, and garden
[CONVENIENT INDICATION]With line markings graduated in teaspoons, tablespoons, fluid ounces, and millilters all the way up to 4oz, this mini measuring glass has the information you're looking for
[THICK and DURABLE] The Thick, Durable Sham provides stability, this measuring glass is perfectly balanced to sit safely on bar or kitchen counters as you delegate the necessary ingredients
[MULTI-PURPOSE LIQUID ]Dry 4OZ/120ML measures dry and liquid ingredients for creating balanced recipes, mixing delicious beverages, making craft cocktails, and more
reviews_5s: There are a sea of measuring glasses to choose from and I had previously bought another but the pouring spout let things drip most of the time so it hit the donate box. That doesn't happen with the Ackers!!! Finally, a Shot Glass Measuring Cup with a deep V pour that stands the non-drip test!! The glass itself is made a bit heavier and feels good in your hand. The markings are clear and plentiful measuring up to 4 oz of liquids! They also make this style that comes with a handle, but we prefer the one without. The only drawback to any of the glass measuring vials is that the markings are printed on the glass instead of being embedded in the glass like Pyrex used to make them..........It's hand wash only! All in all Ackers is the best 4oz. measure we have had. YES, I'd buy it again, especially if I make the mistake and put it in the dishwasher!! Great value, arrived on time with protective packaging.The small measuring beaker is made of thick glass that gives it a very solid feel. The scales that allow for different types of measurements, such as ml, ozs., tbs., and tsp, are large and easy to read. The lip has a spout that makes pouring liquids from the container easy to control.I use this for measuring ingredients for cocktails to replace a stainless steel bar jigger. Accurate measuring increments and large size allows adding multiple ingredients. BUT, the number one reason I bought this is because glass pours cleanly and the spun stainless steel jigger always left some liquid in the bottom.They are perfect. The glass is thick, not cheap thin kind. I really like the pouring feature, and especially like the measuring features. They are the perfect shot glasses 🤓The thickness of the glass and sturdiness is really tops here. I ordered the 2 pack in case I dropped it and broke 1. That's why I had to order these. To my surprise these are thick and heavy. Dripping on of these will make a creator in your floor. Rest assured they are super easy to clean and dishwasher safe. The readibity doesn't fade in the dishwasher. They are spot on accurate measures and will perform well for many years. They are a juice glass size and are very clear glass gives it a great appearance.Great shot glassPrint is kind of small but the glass is large enough to to handle 2 or 3 part drinks and it has a useful pouring spout. A nice addition to my holiday bar set up.These were great for mixing drinks over the Holidays. Love the pour spout and the ability to measure more then 2 oz.I like them just fine. My wife doesn’t though so we will probably return them.It’s heavier and sturdier than I expected. That’s what I was hoping for too.
reviews_1s:
I bought this specifically because it said the measuring lines won't fade in the dishwasher. They did. I don't recommend this if you plan to put it in the dishwasher.After washing, this device is a nice clear shot glass with unknown measurement. That's the beauty of this product's hidden feature!! At first it is a measuring device. Then after you are done with it, next time it becomes an UNmeasured shot glass with no known quantity but heyyy you may not want to know in the first place! Right?

Photo for you. Hope it helps.

Absolutely buy this gadget that is TWO functions in one. A measuring function for a few days, then permanent drinking function for the rest of its life. Highly recommended!

Right.Shot glass measuring cup - no it's notNice thick quality glass. (Purchased Anchor Hocking brand ones a couple times that all shattered). Unfortunately, the measurement markings on this glass are awful-the red print wore off completely after the first 2 uses. I had to mark my own lines in sharpie as pictured. Won’t buy this brand again.Great idea. Perfect size we needed. But even with handwashing the writing is almost completely off on one and close to it with the other. Perfectly useless without the measurements. And this is all within a week of having them.We used it once, and then washed it in the dishwasher on the top rack just like anyone would. Took it out and all the lines were so faded you could hardly read them. Used it some more just hand washing it until my husband forgot and the second time, did it in. Returned the glass because it's useless now. The measurements were great when they were there though. Easy to read and all the amounts you need. Just wish the lines lasted longer.This is the 3rd one of these I tried. Marmibg come right off after a few washes. It’s a great size but they have a real problem. I missed the boat on returning my 1st one.

2nd one was sent back for same problem,

3rd one which is the replacement has markings washing off after a couple of washing’s as wellThese are NOT dishwasher safe. The markings wash off, making them mostly useless. If I could give zero stars I would.The labels started to wash off quickly and left black ink on my hand when I was trying to use it.I absolutely loved the shape, size, and markings on these, as well as the way they poured, until after only a few washing, the markings were completely washed off! I purchased a set with one with black markings and one with red markings. We used the black one first and you can see that all of the markings are gone. I pulled the red one off my shelf, got it wet and noticed that there was red on my fingers. I then ran my fingers on the paper towel, and the red came off on it. So beware, markings are simply stenciled on and are not imbedded in the glass like Pyrex or other quality glassware measurers.
